extension.summary: Echo OnDemand — IPTV VOD + Wrestling Rewind
extension.description: Browse and play Movies and Series from your Xtream Codes IPTV service, plus Wrestling Rewind replays via debrid. Movies listed by genre. Series support full season and episode navigation. Results cached locally. Kodi Omega (v21) compatible. Requires script.module.resolveurl with an active debrid account.
